---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that would help.

## Is this in scope for v1?

Check the [roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap) to see whether this feature is planned.

- [ ] Yes, it is in scope for v1
- [ ] No, but I would like it considered for a future version
- [ ] Not sure
